steps: Add 1 µL, 37.5 ng of Promoter plasmide.
Add 1 µL, 37.5 ng of RBS plasmide.
Add 1 µL, 37.5 ng of CDS plasmide.
Add 1 µL, 37.5 ng of Terminator plasmide.
Add 1 µL, 37.5 ng of ORI plasmide.
Add 1 µL, 37.5 ng of Antibiotic Resistance plasmide.
Transform 5µl of Golden Gate Mix into V. natriegens
creator: Daniel Marchal
